_meta.description: 50 generic jewellery products for PPD demo. NO real-world brand IP. Currency: USD. Three groups: gifting (17), premium/new collection (17), bestseller/entry (16).

products.name: Silver Gift Box Necklace Set
products.description: A delicate silver necklace and bracelet pairing presented in a luxury gift box. Perfect for birthdays and anniversaries.

products.name: Gold Pendant Gift Set
products.description: A classic gold-tone pendant necklace with matching earrings in elegant gift packaging. Ideal for gifting.

products.name: Rose Gold Layering Set
products.description: Three rose gold-tone chain necklaces designed to be worn together or separately. Comes in a satin pouch.

products.name: Crystal Charm Bracelet Gift Set
products.description: A shimmering crystal charm bracelet with a personalised charm slot. Arrives in a ribbon-tied gift box.

products.name: Dainty Pearl Drop Gift Set
products.description: Pearl drop earrings and a matching pearl pendant necklace in a velvet gift case. Classic and timeless.

products.name: Birthstone Pendant Gift Set
products.description: A sterling silver pendant featuring a choice of twelve birthstone colours. Includes a gift card slot.

products.name: Friendship Bracelet Duo
products.description: Two matching woven bracelets with silver clasp — one for you, one for a friend. Comes in a two-slot box.

products.name: Engraved Heart Necklace Gift
products.description: A polished heart pendant with engraving option on the reverse. Presented in a satin-lined gift box.

products.name: Floral Stud Earrings Gift Box
products.description: Delicate flower-shaped enamel stud earrings in four colour options. Boxed with a gift note card.

products.name: Celestial Star Gift Set
products.description: Crescent moon and star pendant necklace with star stud earrings. A thoughtful constellation-themed gift.

products.name: Minimalist Gold Necklace Gift
products.description: A single fine gold-tone chain with a tiny bar pendant. Clean, modern, and giftable at any occasion.

products.name: Stackable Ring Gift Set (3-pack)
products.description: Three slim stackable rings in gold, silver and rose gold tones. Gift boxed with a size guide.

products.name: Thank You Jewellery Gift Set
products.description: A curated set of a necklace and earrings with a 'Thank You' sentiment card. Ready to gift.

products.name: Mother Gift Set — Necklace and Earrings
products.description: A timeless combination of pearl-accent necklace and drop earrings. Presented in a keepsake box.

products.name: Crystal Pendant Necklace Gift
products.description: A sparkling faceted crystal pendant on a fine chain. Arrives boxed with complimentary tissue paper.

products.name: Gold Hoop Gift Set
products.description: Three sizes of gold-tone hoop earrings in a coordinated gift set. Polished and versatile.

products.name: Charm Necklace Gift Set
products.description: A delicate chain necklace with three detachable charms — heart, star, moon. Comes gift-wrapped.

products.name: Diamond-Cut Gold Necklace
products.description: A luxurious 18ct gold-plated diamond-cut chain necklace from the new Radiance Collection. Limited availability.

products.name: Emerald Statement Necklace
products.description: A striking hand-set emerald cabochon pendant in a gold-tone setting. Part of the Gemstone Edit.

products.name: Pearl Strand Premium Necklace
products.description: Freshwater pearl strand necklace with a 14ct gold-filled clasp. New season, restocked by popular demand.

products.name: Sapphire Cluster Drop Earrings
products.description: Oval-cut synthetic sapphire drops in a gold-tone cluster setting. Elegant new arrival for the season.

products.name: Art Deco Cuff Bracelet
products.description: A wide gold-tone cuff with geometric Art Deco engraving. A bold new statement piece.

products.name: Ruby Heart Pendant
products.description: A heart-shaped synthetic ruby pendant on a 14ct gold-filled chain. New to the collection.

products.name: Twisted Gold Rope Chain
products.description: A hand-crafted twisted rope chain in 18ct gold plate. A timeless investment piece, new this season.

products.name: Moonstone Pendant Necklace
products.description: Iridescent natural moonstone set in a fine silver setting. Arrives in a premium jewellery pouch.

products.name: Diamond Halo Drop Earrings
products.description: Pear-shaped CZ stones in a diamond halo setting. New arrival, elevated everyday earring.

products.name: Oxidised Silver Collar Necklace
products.description: A wide oxidised sterling silver collar necklace. Architectural and bold. New for the collection.

products.name: Turquoise Statement Ring
products.description: An oversized turquoise cabochon set in sterling silver. A new signature statement piece.

products.name: Gold Chain Tassel Necklace
products.description: A waterfall of fine gold chains creating a tassel effect. New arrival, makes an instant statement.

products.name: Onyx Drop Earrings
products.description: Polished black onyx drops in a brushed gold setting. Sleek new arrival for the capsule collection.

products.name: Amethyst Cluster Pendant
products.description: A cluster of natural amethyst stones set in a raw-cut gold setting. New season statement.

products.name: Malachite Bangle
products.description: A solid malachite bangle in a gold-tone bezel setting. Premium artisan piece, new this season.

products.name: Pavé Stud Earrings
products.description: Fine pavé-set CZ studs in a push-back setting. New addition to the everyday essentials range.

products.name: Tiger Eye Pendant Necklace
products.description: A polished tiger eye stone pendant on a fine gold-tone chain. New to the mineral collection.

products.name: Classic Chain Necklace
products.description: A timeless curb chain necklace in silver-tone finish. The most versatile piece in any collection.

products.name: Simple Hoop Earrings
products.description: Classic small hoop earrings in gold-tone. A staple that goes with everything.

products.name: Beaded Stretch Bracelet
products.description: Simple beaded stretch bracelet in natural stone tones. Comfortable and effortless everyday wear.

products.name: Thin Stud Earrings Pack (5)
products.description: Five pairs of minimal stud earrings in a mix of shapes and finishes. Everyday essentials.

products.name: Layered Chain Necklace
products.description: Two lengths of chain with a toggle clasp creating an effortless layered look. Everyday bestseller.

products.name: Adjustable Ring
products.description: Open-band adjustable ring in silver-tone. Fits most sizes. A consistent bestseller.

products.name: Teardrop Pendant Necklace
products.description: A simple teardrop pendant on a fine chain. Minimal and elegant, popular across all age groups.

products.name: Huggie Hoop Earrings
products.description: Small huggie hoop earrings with a smooth hinge closure. Comfortable for all-day wear, consistent bestseller.

products.name: Bar Pendant Necklace
products.description: A slim horizontal bar pendant on a delicate chain. Clean, modern, and perennially popular.

products.name: Pearl Stud Earrings
products.description: Faux pearl stud earrings in classic white. Timeless and suitable for any occasion.

products.name: Multi-Strand Bead Necklace
products.description: Three strands of mixed-bead necklace in earth tones. Casual and versatile bestseller.

products.name: Twisted Wire Bangle
products.description: A simple twisted wire bangle in gold-tone. Stackable and popular as a casual everyday piece.

products.name: Crescent Moon Necklace
products.description: A fine crescent moon pendant on a delicate chain. One of the consistently top-selling pieces.

products.name: Statement Chain Earrings
products.description: Bold drop earrings featuring chunky chain links in gold-tone. A top-selling statement piece.

products.name: Snake Chain Necklace
products.description: A smooth snake-link chain necklace in silver-tone. Slim, polished and consistently popular.

products.name: Mixed Metal Stacking Rings (4-pack)
products.description: Four slim rings in alternating gold and silver tone for easy stacking. A top-selling introductory set.
